summary: Plan-mode classification only. #88954 remains the live canonical issue for the beta-channel update failure. #89645 is related work against the same area, but it is not merge-ready or usable as a fixed-by-candidate closeout because proof and checks are still blocking.

actions.reason: #88954 is the open user-facing report and should remain the canonical thread while validation of any fix continues.

The PR is related to the canonical bug and may contain useful contributor work, but current proof/check status and review-bot blockers prevent treating it as the canonical fix or closing #88954 as fixed by this candidate.
